name: Shippit
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Shippit"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.shippit.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-on Website"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.shippit.com/contact-us/", "children": [{"text": "contact Shippit"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the Shippit add-on you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automatically sync your orders from Neto to Shippit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Map your Shipping options to a Shippit service type."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automatically fulfil your orders once they are shipped."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manually send orders to Shippit to be fulfilled."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Generate an API Key"}], "data-id": "generate-your-api-key"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "So that Shippit and Neto can communicate you will first need to generate an API key."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Developer Tools section, click on "}, {"text": "API Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Check the "}, {"text": "Enable Neto\u00a0API Webhook", "bold": true}, {"text": " box, and copy your "}, {"text": "Neto API Key", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. Don\u2019t close this page as you\u2019ll need to enter the webhook into Shippit soon."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Shippit Add-on"}], "data-id": "configure-shippit"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto\u00a0 control panel click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Shipping section find "}, {"text": "Shippit", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click on "}, {"text": "Get App", "bold": true}, {"text": ", then "}, {"text": "Get App", "bold": true}, {"text": " again."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be directed to Shippit to enter your "}, {"text": "Domain", "bold": true}, {"text": " (website address) and the "}, {"text": "API Key", "bold": true}, {"text": " you copied earlier. Once entered click "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll now be given the API webhook URL to enter into your Neto API settings page. Then click the "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your Neto control panel and Shippit are now linked to transfer orders and dispatch information."}]}]
